---
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    tbl-cap-location: top
editor: source
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source(here::here("common.R"))
```

Scores from the outer evaluation folds per dataset and model, see `scores.[csv|rds]`.

## Score Plots

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Harrell's C

```{r scores-boxplot-harrell-c}
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 11

for (measure_id in msr_tbl[type == "Discrimination" & !erv, id]) {
  print(plot_scores(scores, type = "box", eval_measure_id = measure_id, tuning_measure_id = "harrell_c", dodge = FALSE, flip = TRUE))
}
```

### ISBS

```{r scores-boxplot-isbs}
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 11

for (measure_id in msr_tbl[type == "Scoring Rule" & !erv, id]) {
  print(plot_scores(scores, type = "box", eval_measure_id = measure_id, tuning_measure_id = "isbs", dodge = FALSE, flip = TRUE))
}
```

:::
